# Planner Decisions — Simple Sensor Module Line

*Generated by `planning/planner.py` from customer requirements.*

## Inputs

| Input | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Product | Simple Sensor Module |
| Daily output | 80/day |
| Automation | manual |
| Floor area | 80 m² |
| Workers | 3 |
| Quality | basic |
| Regulated | False |
| Budget | low |

## Decisions

| Decision | Result | Rule | Rationale |
|----------|--------|------|-----------|
| Automation tier | manual | automation_level.level (normalized) | Declared automation is 'manual'; 27 units/worker/day → tier drives which automated stations are viable. |
| Parallel assembly | 1 | single station meets takt | One assembly station (cap ≈ 480/shift) covers 80/day. |
| Robot handling cell | NO | low automation & throughput | Automation 'manual' and 80/day do not justify a robot → no robot cell. |
| Vision inspection | NO | quality mentions ['optical', 'vision', 'camera', 'high'] OR regulated; budget ≥ low | No high/optical quality requirement and not regulated → skip vision. |
| Functional test | NO | quality mentions ['functional', 'electrical', 'test', 'flow'] OR regulated; budget ≥ low | No functional-test / regulatory requirement → skip functional test. |
| Compact layout | YES | area ≤ 150 m² | Small 80 m² floor → compact spacing. |
| Floor-area feasibility | 26.0 | sum(station area) ≤ available area | Stations need ≈ 26 m²; available 80 m². |

## Resulting line (4 stations, compact layout)

- **S01** — Loading Station
- **S02** — Assisted Assembly Station
- **S03** — Packaging Station
- **S04** — Finished Goods Storage

Flow: S01 → S02 → S03 → S04  (+X)
